sql.where:
b.status <> 9
AND u.phone LIKE concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND b.status = 0 AND b.expire_time IS NOT NULL AND b.expire_time <= NOW()
AND b.status = 0 AND (b.expire_time IS NULL OR b.expire_time > NOW())
AND b.status = #{status}
AND b.created_date >= #{startDate}
AND b.created_date < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND b.store_id IN (${storeIds})

mapper.select:
SELECT b.vip_benefit_id AS vipBenefitId, b.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS nickname, u.phone AS phone, b.store_addr_id AS storeAddrId, COALESCE(sa.storeName, s.storeName) AS storeName, c.store_addr_ids AS storeAddrIds, c.card_name AS cardName,
CASE WHEN b.status = 0 AND b.expire_time IS NOT NULL AND b.expire_time <= NOW() THEN 3 ELSE b.status END AS status, b.remark AS remark, DATE_FORMAT(b.expire_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS expireTime, DATE_FORMAT(b.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdDate FROM vip_benefit b LEFT JOIN user_info u ON b.user_id = u.userId LEFT JOIN vip_benefit_card c ON b.vip_card_id = c.vip_card_id LEFT JOIN store_address sa ON b.store_addr_id = sa.storeAddrId LEFT JOIN store s ON b.store_id = s.storeId
ORDER BY b.created_date DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM vip_benefit b LEFT JOIN user_info u ON b.user_id = u.userId
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM vip_benefit_transfer WHERE vip_benefit_id = #{vipBenefitId} AND status IN (20, 40)
mapper.update: UPDATE vip_benefit b JOIN store_address sa ON sa.storeAddrId = #{storeAddrId} SET b.store_addr_id = sa.storeAddrId, b.store_id = sa.storeId WHERE b.vip_benefit_id = #{vipBenefitId} AND b.status IN (0, 2)
